title: Bombay Shaving Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Shaving Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bombay Shaving Company! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bombay Shaving Company:
Bombay Shaving Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company!
